14.reason: [If the file "article.txt" does not exist, fopen returns NULL, and subsequent operations like fgets will cause undefined behavior. The program should check if p is NULL and handle the error.]

33.reason: [a[k].num is used uninitialized. It should be initialized to 1 when a new word starts, not incremented from garbage value.]

45.reason: [Loop condition uses j > i but accesses a[j], which may go out of bounds since valid indices are 0 to cnt-1. Should be j >= i+1 or j from i+1 to cnt-1. Also, this nested loop logic for merging duplicates is flawed and inefficient.]

71.reason: [If p was NULL due to failed fopen, fclose(NULL) is undefined behavior. Must check p before fclose.]
